content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed market with Nifty flat, Bank Nifty weak (-0.89%) led by PSU bank slide (-1.57%), but Energy/Metals leading. VIX cooling but at 17.7 still elevated. Book is 55% deployed with several positions near SLs and TORNTPOWER showing extended overbought conditions after 39% April rally. Priority is position management over new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 1200,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PSU Bank index down -1.57% today, MAHABANK at -3.5% loss. CMP 78.52 is approaching SL 76.50. Stock gapped down at open and despite strong Q4 fundamentals, Rs 7,500 cr equity raise overhang creates dilution risk. PSU bank rotation has stalled. Better to exit at -3.5% than risk SL hit at -6%. Free up Rs 94k of capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.7%, but current SL 1032.38 already locks in ~+5% gain (above breakeven). No-op MODIFY would be wasted — keeping HOLD via position_actions. Actually, this should be HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF at -1.5%, SL at 119 still has room. Hold as portfolio hedge. Akshaya Tritiya season ahead may support price. Don't tighten SL given hedge function."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, stock at fresh 52w high 1437.90 on volume after blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%). Trail SL from 1418 to 1425 to lock in ~+0.85% minimum gain while letting target run to 1465. Defensive FMCG outperformer."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%, stock near 52w high 414.40. Trail SL from 406 to 408 — locks in small gain above breakeven at 404.50. Q4 results May 15 are catalyst. Power sector leading with peak demand record."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 28,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock up 39% in April, hit 52w high 1816 today and reversed sharply to 1754 (-3.4% intraday from high). Bearish supplementary research: trailing P/E ~28x, average analyst target Rs 1,422 implies 16% downside, Q1 FY26 PAT already -25% YoY. Classic 'sell the rally' signature with intraday reversal candle. Position at -2.7% with SL at 1775 already breached on intraday low 1746. Exit before SL trigger to limit damage. POWERGRID + NTPC give us cleaner power exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2% on massive 5.3x volume surge today after Organon $11.75bn acquisition announcement (largest Indian pharma deal ever). Trail SL from 1740 to 1742 — modest tighten to lock in tiny gain above entry 1734. Volume confirmation of breakout, defensive sector. Target 1830 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.2%, near breakeven. SL 318 close to current 318.40 — already tight. Defensive transmission play, Q4 results May 19 catalyst. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CUB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (+25% PAT) and 1:3 bonus catalyst, but stock already gapped up 4.3% today and reversed from intraday high 293.51 to 282.85 — signature post-news fade. Wait for consolidation; chase risk too high after gap-and-fade pattern."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PIRAMALFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.61% today after already running 16% in April. Hit 2061 then sold off to 2020 — extended momentum chase setup. Better to wait for pullback to 1900-1950 zone. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today (binary event). EV transition concerns and e-Vitara delay to Dec 2026. Tata/Mahindra winning EV share. Avoid binary event days for new entries."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -12.55% YoY, stock fell post-results. Goldman target 1910 is constructive but near-term momentum muted. Wait for clearer setup."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "PSU Bank weakness persists, exit at -3.5% rather than risk full SL hit at -6%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+6.7% gain, SL at 1032.38 already locks in +5% — no further tightening needed. Let target 1095 run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL has room, Akshaya Tritiya seasonal demand ahead."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1418 to 1425 — locks in gain above entry on 52w high breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 408.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from 406 to 408 — locks in small gain above entry 404.50 ahead of Q4 results May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday reversal from 52w high after 39% April rally, intraday low 1746 already touched SL 1775. Exit to preserve capital."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "Modest trail above entry 1734 after Organon deal volume confirmation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near breakeven, SL already tight at 318. Q4 results May 19 catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER orders still OPEN from prior tick — TATAPOWER limit at 443 well below current 458, will not fill; should consider canceling on next tick if not actionable. CUB and PIRAMALFIN worth watching for pullback entries. SUNPHARMA momentum strong on Organon deal — could add on dip to 1720 zone.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Exiting MAHABANK and TORNTPOWER frees ~Rs 145k in capital and reduces both PSU bank exposure and the overheated power cluster. Still maintain power exposure via NTPC + POWERGRID (cleaner regulated names). Power cluster after exits = ~Rs 105k (NTPC + POWERGRID + portion of TATAPOWER if it fills) which is ~10% of capital, well within sector limits. Cash buffer will improve to ~60% post-exits, providing dry powder for genuine setups. Win rate at 19% over rolling 5d is concerning — being more selective and ruthless on losing positions is the right adjustment."
}
